## Summary

- 

## Scope

- [ ] Docs/release-only change
- [ ] Scanner
- [ ] Policy/rules
- [ ] Proxy
- [ ] Audit/logs
- [ ] CLI/config

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm install`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] CLI smoke, if CLI behavior changed
- [ ] Pack/fresh install smoke, if release or package metadata changed

## Security Notes

Describe any policy, proxy, audit, or secret-handling implications.

- Does this change allow/block/confirm behavior?
- Does this change stdout/stderr protocol handling?
- Does this change audit log contents or redaction?
- Have logs, configs, screenshots, and fixtures been checked for secrets?
